name: linRegisterSchedulerStartStopCallback
title: linRegisterSchedulerStartStopCallback
description: Registers a callback function which is invoked if a LIN scheduler is either started or stopped.

parameters.name: callbackName
parameters.description: The name of the callback function which should be registered. The callback must have the following signature: void func (dword channel, dword started, int64 eventTime)

return: Returns 1 if the registration succeeded, otherwise 0.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
